✚ Secret Note ✚

  • Yet another birthday bot, this time for Rhys! I hope you have a great birthday.

  • This is the first time I made a multi bot, I tested them but if something is weird I apologize!

  • Added to that, with a multiple characters bot it may happen that only one speaks or they speak for you. I can't do things about it.

··················

Heads up about the LLM

Once a bot is posted, I can't control what it does or says. This includes the bot repeating itself or speaking for you. If that happens, keep edititng the message, swipe and generate a new response. Trust me, I know it's frustrating.
